message:
chore: add macOS resource fork pattern to .gitignore

The ._* pattern ignores AppleDouble resource fork files created by macOS
when copying files to non-HFS+ filesystems. These ephemeral files should
never be committed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -33,6 +33,7 @@ manifests/
 # OS files
 .DS_Store
 Thumbs.db
+._*
 
 # Temporary files
 *.tmp
